meaning: n.[天]仙王(星)座 [希神] 克普斯(埃塞俄比亚国王安德洛默达之父)
examples: In Greek mythology, Cepheus represents a King of Ethiopia.
Sharpless 140 lies almost 3, 000 light-years from Earth in the constellation Cepheus.
NGC 7380 is located in the constellation Cepheus about 7,000 light-years from Earth within the Milky Way Galaxy.
